headline: Workplace injury Preparation Checklist — Farmington
articleBody:
Workplace injury Preparation Checklist for Farmington Clients

Before your Workplace injury appointment with Just Work Comp Law, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Incident report
2. Medical records
3. Witness statements
4. Employer notification
5. Doctor notes

Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 to get started.
